parameters.query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_tasks,
       SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as completed_tasks,
       SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'pending' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pending_tasks,
       SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'failed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as failed_tasks
FROM task_queue
WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day'

SELECT client_id, COUNT(*) as message_count
FROM chat_messages
WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day'
GROUP BY client_id
ORDER BY message_count DESC
LIMIT 10

SELECT client_id,
       SUM(CASE WHEN metric_name = 'n8n_runs' THEN value ELSE 0 END) as total_runs,
       SUM(CASE WHEN metric_name = 'api_calls' THEN value ELSE 0 END) as api_calls
FROM usage_metrics
WHERE recorded_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day'
GROUP BY client_id

parameters.subject: SAOS Daily Report — {{ $json.report_date }}

body.message: Daily report generated for {{ $json.report_date }}: {{ $json.summary.completed_tasks }} tasks completed, {{ $json.summary.failed_tasks }} failed.
